SEARCH
Module game.weekend.simplelibrary
Package game.weekend.simplelibrary

Class GBL

java.lang.Object
game.weekend.simplelibrary.GBL
public class GBL extends Object
Simplifying the GridBagLayout layout manager.

Using GridBagLayout requires a lot of code and attention. GBL leaves only the necessary functionality and requires a small amount of code.

The panel is divided into a number of rows and columns. Then, from left to right, the controls are sequentially specified, for which the alignment method is specified (by selecting the appropriate method) and the number of cells occupied in the row (by specifying the second parameter of the method). The height of the controls is always assumed to be 1. After the current row is filled, the newLine() method is called and the next row is filled.

    Constructor
    Description

    Create GBL Location Manager.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addExtB(Component c, int width, int hight)
    Add a component to the current row and position, stretching it in all directions.
    void
    addExtH(Component c, int width)
    Add a component to the current row and position, stretching it horizontally.
    void
    addFixL(Component c, int width)
    Add a left-aligned component to the current row and position.
    void
    addFixR(Component c, int width)
    Add a right-aligned component to the current row and position.
    void
    addHor(int width)
    Add horizontal stretch to the current row.
    void
    addVer(int height)
    Add vertical stretch to the current row.
    void
    newLine()
    Go to the next line.

  • Constructor Details

    • GBL

      public GBL(JPanel p, boolean border)
      Create GBL Location Manager.
      Parameters:
      p - the panel on which the components will be located.
      border - true - if the components should be placed with some gap between them, false - if there is no gap.

  • Method Details

    • addFixL

      public void addFixL(Component c, int width)
      Add a left-aligned component to the current row and position.
      Parameters:
      c - component.
      width - component width.

    • addFixR

      public void addFixR(Component c, int width)
      Add a right-aligned component to the current row and position.
      Parameters:
      c - component.
      width - component width.

    • addExtH

      public void addExtH(Component c, int width)
      Add a component to the current row and position, stretching it horizontally.
      Parameters:
      c - component.
      width - component width.

    • addExtB

      public void addExtB(Component c, int width, int hight)
      Add a component to the current row and position, stretching it in all directions.
      Parameters:
      c - component.
      width - component width.
      hight - component hight.

    • addHor

      public void addHor(int width)
      Add horizontal stretch to the current row.
      Parameters:
      width - stretch width.

    • addVer

      public void addVer(int height)
      Add vertical stretch to the current row.
      Parameters:
      height - stretch height.

    • newLine

      public void newLine()
      Go to the next line.
